title: trisetaria panicea var. includens
intro: Trisetaria panicea var. includens, also known as the included false oat-grass or wood false oat-grass, is a plant species within the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trisetaria panicea var. includens include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as anti-inflammatory effects that can help soothe sore throats and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Trisetaria panicea var. includens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
